message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Implementing: Add Support for Editing Multiple Files with click.edit (click.edit() accepts str or iterable of filenames). I need to edit src/click/_termui_impl.py and src/click/termui.py.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Adding process_priority param to click.edit()/Editor class - need to touch both files. What's your feature/files?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Same files needed for both features (process_priority param vs multi-file support) - unavoidable overlap. I'll accept overlapping ownership, implement my process_priority feature now, then git merge your branch afterward and resolve any conflicts. Let me know when you push DONE.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
your_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: My feature: click.edit() filename param accepts str | Iterable[str] | None (multi-file editing), renames Editor.edit_file->edit_files. Overlap is unavoidable since both features touch Editor.__init__/edit() signatures and the public click.edit() function. Plan: we each implement independently now; at merge time I will run git merge team/agent2 and hand-resolve any conflicts so both features coexist (my filename param + your process_priority param). I'll keep my changes additive (new param, renamed method with same behavior for single file) to minimize conflict surface. OK to proceed in parallel?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Confirmed, proceeding with overlapping ownership. Will merge at the end and resolve conflicts.

type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Implemented process_priority param on Editor.__init__ and click.edit(). Added Editor._set_process_priority(pid) called from edit_file() right after Popen. Tests pass. Ready to merge whenever you're done - I'll pull team/agent1 and hand-resolve conflicts (expecting your edit_file->edit_files rename to conflict with my call site).

type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Implemented multi-file click.edit() support: Editor.edit_file renamed to edit_files(filenames: Iterable[str]), edit() function filename param now accepts str | Iterable[str] | None. Ready to merge whenever you are.
